findings.title: auth check absent on the login route (v2, line 88)
findings.summary: The login route never verifies the caller is authenticated.

findings.title: Weak password hash
findings.summary: Password digest uses an unsalted fast hash.

findings.title: SQL injection in query builder
findings.summary: User input is concatenated into a SQL string.

findings.title: Unlabeled emitted finding
findings.summary: An emitted finding the corpus has no label for.

findings.title: No CI pipeline configured
findings.summary: The repo has no continuous-integration workflow.

findings.title: CI is entirely absent from the repo
findings.summary: A second, distinct fileless finding sharing the lens+category signature.
